task_completion.description: Verify that a folder named 'Chicago Distribution Network' has been created in the application's sidebar (e.g., Google Earth Places panel).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a folder icon with the text 'Chicago Distribution Network' in the 'Places' or 'My Places' sidebar.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the first path 'Primary Route - Hub to Regional DC' with red styling.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a path entry named 'Primary Route - Hub to Regional DC' in the sidebar and a corresponding red line on the map starting near O'Hare airport.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the second path 'Primary Route - Regional DC to South Hub' with red styling.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a path entry named 'Primary Route - Regional DC to South Hub' in the sidebar and a corresponding red line on the map connecting the end of the first route (Joliet area) to the south.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the third path 'Secondary Route - East Connection' with blue styling.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a path entry named 'Secondary Route - East Connection' in the sidebar and a corresponding blue line (visually thinner than the red lines if distinguishable) extending east towards Gary.

task_completion.description: Verify the overall geographic shape of the network on the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map should show a continuous route forming a shape roughly going South-West from O'Hare to Joliet, then East/South-East to University Park, then East to Gary. It should look like a scoop or a 'J' shape rotated.

task_completion.description: Verify that the user exports the network as a KML file to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save File' dialog, 'Save Place As' window, or file manager view showing 'chicago_distribution_network.kml' being saved to or existing in '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent is using the GIS application's GUI (e.g., clicking 'Add Path', 'Properties') rather than writing KML code manually.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Google Earth Pro (or similar) interface, toolbars, and property dialogs, not a text editor or terminal writing XML.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent is not simply pasting a pre-generated KML block into a file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen interacting with map tools (pins, paths, styles), not pasting large blocks of text.

integrity.description: Verify that the map updates reflect user actions step-by-step.
integrity.visual_evidence: Paths should appear sequentially or be edited in dialogs, rather than the entire network appearing instantly from an imported file.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
The task involves Google Earth Pro. 
Target Folder: 'Chicago Distribution Network'.
Path 1: 'Primary Route - Hub to Regional DC' (Red, 3px) -> O'Hare (41.97N, 87.91W) to Joliet (41.45N, 88.08W).
Path 2: 'Primary Route - Regional DC to South Hub' (Red, 3px) -> Joliet to University Park (41.44N, 87.72W).
Path 3: 'Secondary Route - East Connection' (Blue, 2px) -> University Park to Gary (41.59N, 87.35W).
Export: /home/ga/Documents/chicago_distribution_network.kml.
